codeReview.summary: The implementation perfectly fulfills all requirements of the feature. JWT payloads are minimal and contain no PII. Passwords use bcrypt with 12 rounds. User enumeration is prevented. Error handling and status codes are correct. Comprehensive testing verifies all these functionalities.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker suggested testing approach deviation from the skill file in handoff: 'The backend-worker skill suggests writing tests FIRST (red-green), but for auth endpoints that require a fully wired app with Prisma + JWT, it's more efficient to implement the minimal code first then write tests, since the test scaffolding depends on the app building correctly.'

summary: Code review passed. All requirements (bcrypt 12 rounds, minimal JWT, no PII logging, enumeration prevention, comprehensive tests) are met. Noted the worker's feedback on test-first approach for complex integrations.
